sentences.arabic: أَعْلَنَ الْمَتْحَفُ عَنْ دُخُولٍ مَجَّانِيٍّ لِلأَطْفَالِ يَوْمَ السَّبْتِ.
sentences.translation: Muzej je objavio besplatan ulaz za djecu u subotu.
sentences.translationEn: The museum announced free entry for children on Saturday.

sentences.translation: Mnoge porodice su došle da posjete muzej.
sentences.translationEn: Many families came to visit the museum.

sentences.translation: Djeca su bila oduševljena kipovima i starim slikama.
sentences.translationEn: The children were amazed by the statues and old paintings.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَ الْمَتْحَفُ تَكْرَارَ هَذِهِ الْمُبَادَرَةِ كُلَّ شَهْرٍ.
sentences.translation: Muzej je odlučio ponavljati ovu inicijativu svaki mjesec.
sentences.translationEn: The museum decided to repeat this initiative every month.
